channel.title: Light on Compossible
channel.description: Recent content in Light on Compossible

item.title: To Hector
item.description:
“ Do you not see how necessary a world of pains and troubles is to school an intelligence and make it a soul? ” (John Keats)

A little piece of Heaven

Fallen to the Earth

Lightness made

Heavy

In the

Transubstantiation

Of birth

Kindled from the

Darkness

Sung into being

From

An infinite

Shining no-thing

Thrown-blown

Ringing-round

Singing

Bringing

Divinity

Free from useless

Suffering

Though you must be

Beset
